overridesNotes.postcss: Forced >= 8.5.10 transitively (Vite 8.0.7 still pulls 8.5.8). Closes Dependabot alert #8 (GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93 / CVE-2026-41305) — XSS via unescaped </style> in CSS stringify output. Not reachable in our build (we don't process user-submitted CSS) but the override is cheaper than arguing reachability. Remove once Vite's own pin moves past 8.5.10.
overridesNotes.js-cookie: Forced >= 3.0.7 transitively (@clerk/shared 3.47.5 pulls 3.0.5). Closes GHSA-qjx8-664m-686j — per-instance prototype hijack in assign() enabling cookie-attribute injection (high). js-cookie's get/set/remove API has been stable since 3.0.0 so the bump is API-safe for Clerk. The npm-audit --audit-level=high gate in CI failed the deploy on this; remove the override once Clerk's own @clerk/shared pin clears js-cookie 3.0.6+.
